column1: Prime Hood Cleaning LLC|local-directory-chamber|https://primehoodcleaningservices.com/|https://www.chamberofcommerce.com/business-directory/florida/tampa/air-duct-cleaning-service/2026095738-prime-hood-cleaning-llc|https://primehoodcleaningservices.com/services/|yes|primehoodcleaningllc@gmail.com|813-922-2434|medium-high|medium|Official services page says commercial kitchen cleaning in Florida, explains hood cleaning importance, lists exhaust fan cleaning and kitchen hood cleaning, but also sells kitchen deep cleaning, dumpster cleaning, pressure washer services, and appliance cleaning.

Fire Safety Cleaning - Hood Cleaning Service|allbiz|https://www.firesafetycc.com/|https://www.allbiz.com/business/fire-safety-cleaning-hood-cleaning-516-482-4255|https://www.firesafetycc.com/contact|yes|customerservice@firesafetycc.com|516-482-4255|high|medium-high|Official site says 25+ years in kitchen exhaust cleaning, FDNY and Nassau County certified, and publishes direct contact info, but the company is clearly broader across hood cleaning plus fire system inspections, extinguisher sales, and suppression work.

CJ's Hood Cleaning|local-directory-mapquest|https://cjs-hoodcleaning.com/|https://www.mapquest.com/us/new-jersey/cjs-hood-cleaning-376763811|https://cjs-hoodcleaning.com/|no||201-757-7350|high|low-medium|Official site is strongly hood-specific: ventilation system hood cleaning, kitchen hood cleaning, commercial kitchen focus, and Paterson NJ service positioning. Mixed risk exists only at the level of kitchen appliances and equipment cleaning.

Hoods Cleaned|local-directory-mapquest|https://hoodscleaned.com/|https://www.mapquest.com/us/florida/hoods-cleaned-377881780|https://hoodscleaned.com/|no||954-609-7445|high|medium|Official site is commercial-kitchen specific and centered on grease removal for restaurant exhaust systems. Risk is moderate because the business also pushes equipment cleaning and soak tanks, though still inside restaurant-kitchen maintenance.

Hampton Roads Hood Cleaning|local-directory-mapquest|http://www.hoodcleaninghr.com/|https://www.mapquest.com/us/virginia/hampton-roads-hood-cleaning-434035258|http://www.hoodcleaninghr.com/contact.html|yes|mark@hoodcleaninghr.com|757-944-0726|high|low|Official site is explicitly about kitchen exhaust and hood cleaning for restaurants and commercial kitchens and publishes both phone and email. Only mild risk comes from occasional office-cleanliness wording on the contact page.

Hood Grease Solution|local-directory-mapquest|https://hoodgrease.com/|https://www.mapquest.com/us/california/hood-grease-solution-380511979|https://hoodgrease.com/|no||858-248-1366|high|low-medium|Official site is tightly centered on commercial kitchen hood cleaning, exhaust fan cleaning, compliance, and San Diego restaurant work. Public phone was easy to recover from the directory, but the official page currently exposes form-first contact rather than a visible phone or email.

Montana Affordable Services LLC|findhoodcleaner|https://maffordableservices.com/|https://findhoodcleaner.com/cleaners/montana-affordable-services-llc-kalispell|https://maffordableservices.com/|no||406-314-7271|low|very-high|Reverse-traced official site is a broad maintenance business with crawlspaces, carpet cleaning, HVAC, appliance repair, gutters, insulation, and handyman work. This looks like a weak hood fit despite the directory inclusion, so it is useful mainly as a false-positive example.

Urban Cleaning Pros LLC|findhoodcleaner|https://www.urbancleaningpros.com/|https://findhoodcleaner.com/cleaners/urban-cleaning-pros-llc-edmond|https://www.urbancleaningpros.com/contact-us|no||405-440-3027|medium-low|high|Official site does include Kitchen Exhaust Hood Cleaning under commercial services, but the business identity is primarily pressure washing, window cleaning, driveway cleaning, building washing, and other exterior-cleaning services.

Enviro-Master of Reno Lake Tahoe|findhoodcleaner|https://enviro-master.com/commercial-cleaning-locations/reno-lake-tahoe-nevada/|https://findhoodcleaner.com/cleaners/enviro-master-of-reno-lake-tahoe-reno|https://enviro-master.com/commercial-cleaning-locations/reno-lake-tahoe-nevada/|no||775-227-6087|low|very-high|The official location page is accessible and local-owner backed, but the core offer is full commercial cleaning: restrooms, floors, windows, parking areas, drain treatment, janitorial supplies, and hygiene programs. Commercial kitchens are only one vertical among many.

National Fire Safety Pro|long-tail-seo|https://nationalfiresafetypro.com/|https://nationalfiresafetypro.com/kitchen-exhaust-cleaning-services/|https://nationalfiresafetypro.com/kitchen-exhaust-cleaning-services/|no||914.380.8466|medium-high|high|The official kitchen exhaust page is explicit about exhaust hood, filters, ductwork, fans, access doors, and NFPA 96, but the company is fundamentally a fire-protection operator spanning extinguishers, suppression systems, sprinklers, backflow, and ventilation systems.
